name: eslint-wrap: second invocation skips npm install when node_modules/<plugin>/package.json already pinned to requested version
command: mkdir -p node_modules/eslint-plugin-react-hooks && printf '{"version":"4.6.0"}' > node_modules/eslint-plugin-react-hooks/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/wrap-eslint.sh" --rule-id g-react-002 --eslint-rule react-hooks/exhaustive-deps --eslint-plugin-npm eslint-plugin-react-hooks --eslint-plugin-version 4.6.0 --paths "src/**/*.tsx" 2>out.txt && ! grep -E "npm install" out.txt && grep -E "cached" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
